problem id: 201b150e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10010000 -> 00100010
  10011111 -> 00111100
  10101000 -> 01010010
  11010111 -> 10101101
  01011000 -> 10110001
  10001000 -> 00010010
  01110110 -> 11101101
  00111011 -> 01110110
  10001010 -> 00010110
  10000001 -> 00000000

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 11001011
